learningResources.title: Official Model Context Protocol Specification
learningResources.description: The official protocol documentation, schemas, and API specification for building MCP clients and servers.
learningResources.author: Anthropic

learningResources.title: Microsoft Developer: MCP for Beginners (Lessons 1-11)
learningResources.description: Comprehensive structured curriculum covering core architectures, prompts, resources, tools, and cross-language setups (Python, TS, Java, .NET).
learningResources.author: Microsoft Developer

learningResources.title: KodeKloud: MCP Explained for Beginners
learningResources.description: Deep-dive video course covering client-server architecture, JSON-RPC, tools discovery, and practical flight booking demos.
learningResources.author: KodeKloud

learningResources.title: Matt Pocock: Get Started With MCP // 2-Min Guide
learningResources.description: A rapid developer-oriented walkthrough of configuring standard MCP servers and clients using TypeScript.
learningResources.author: Matt Pocock

learningResources.title: Fahd Mirza: Step-by-Step MCP Server Setup
learningResources.description: Approach-friendly tutorial that covers how to build a basic server and hook it up to local database tables.
learningResources.author: Fahd Mirza

learningResources.title: Amit Thinks: Web Scraping and MCP Integration
learningResources.description: Covers how to integrate web search engines and crawlers into your custom MCP servers to feed LLMs.
learningResources.author: Amit Thinks

learningResources.title: Mastering MCP: Build AI Agent Tool Integrations
learningResources.description: Step-by-step video tutorials for using Node.js and Python SDKs to create tool bindings and servers for LLMs.
learningResources.author: AI Academy

learningResources.title: Advanced Agent Orchestration Masterclass
learningResources.description: Cohort-based advanced training on designing secure custom filesystem and database adapters for AI agent teams.
learningResources.author: Orchestra AI

learningResources.title: Building Custom SDK Adapters from Scratch
learningResources.description: A comprehensive blog post on integrating third-party REST APIs into standard Model Context Protocol structures.
learningResources.author: CodeCraft
